topic: Query and analyze logs in Azure Monitor using KQL
key_facts: The maximum number of results that you can retrieve in the Log Analytics portal experience is 30,000.
By default, the query returns records generated in the last 24 hours.
Set a filter on the DurationMs column to limit the records to those that took more than 150 milliseconds.

Note

 Creating an alert rule is not supported in the demo environment.

Tutorial: Use Log Analytics

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Feedback 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Summarize this article for me
 
 
 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 Log Analytics in the Azure portal lets you explore and analyze data collected by Azure Monitor Logs .

Prerequisites

 This tutorial uses the Log Analytics demo environment , which includes plenty of sample data that supports the sample queries.
You can also use your own Azure subscription, but you might not have data in the same tables.
